speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe how to make something

cueCard.topic: Describe how to cook a simple dish.
bullets: and explain why you like cooking it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about a simple fried rice. First, add the rice and vegetables to the pan. Mix them well. Turn on the heat. Check the rice after five minutes. I like cooking it because it's quick and easy.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Describing places
questions: Is your home quiet or loud?
Do you prefer hot or cold weather?
speaking.sampleAnswer: My home is usually quiet. I prefer warm weather, not too hot or cold. My classroom is clean and comfortable.
